lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਾ ਖੜਿ ਰਸਾਤਲਿ ਦੀਤ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: chit na aaeo paarabraham taa kharr rasaatal deet |7|
lines.english: But still, if you do not come to remember the Supreme Lord God, then you shall be taken and consigned to the most hideous hell! ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਛਿਦ੍ਰੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਾੜਾ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa rog na chhidru kichh naa kichh kaarraa sog |
lines.english: You may have a body free of disease and deformity, and have no worries or grief at all;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਤੋਨੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਜੀਇ ਨ ਸੰਕ ਧਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh keeton aapanaa jee na sank dhariaa |
lines.english: you may take everything as your own, and have no fear in your mind at all;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਰਤੁ ਨ ਆਵੀ ਚਿਤਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਭੋਗੈ ਭੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: mirat na aavee chit tis ahinis bhogai bhog |
lines.english: you may be unmindful of death, and night and day revel in pleasures;

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜਮਕੰਕਰ ਵਸਿ ਪਰਿਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: chit na aaeo paarabraham jamakankar vas pariaa |8|
lines.english: but still, if you do not come to remember the Supreme Lord God, you shall fall under the power of the Messenger of Death. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: kirapaa kare jis paarabraham hovai saadhoo sang |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord showers His Mercy, and we find the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਓਹੁ ਵਧਾਈਐ ਤਿਉ ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jiau ohu vadhaaeeai tiau tiau har siau rang |
lines.english: The more time we spend there, the more we come to love the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹਾ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਕਾ ਖਸਮੁ ਆਪਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: duhaa siriaa kaa khasam aap avar na doojaa thaau |
lines.english: The Lord is the Master of both worlds; there is no other place of rest.
Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੁਠੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੯॥੧॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: satigur tutthai paaeaa naanak sachaa naau |9|1|26|
lines.english: When the True Guru is pleased and satisfied, O Nanak, the True Name is obtained. ||9||1||26||
The meditatives practice meditation,
O mind, seek out the way! ||1||Pause||
I do not know what pleases my Lord.
and the wise practice spiritual wisdom,
but how rare are those who know God! ||1||
The worshipper of Bhagaauti practices self-discipline,
the Yogi speaks of liberation,
and the ascetic is absorbed in asceticism. ||2||
The men of silence observe silence,
the Sanyaasees observe celibacy,
and the Udaasees abide in detachment. ||3||
There are nine forms of devotional worship.
Those who utter only One Word, those who take many forms, the naked renunciates,
The householders assert their faith in family life. ||4||
The Pandits recite the Vedas.
and those who bathe at holy places of pilgrimage-||5||
the wearers of patched coats, the magicians, those who remain always awake,
Those who go without food, those who never touch others,
and those who are wise in their own minds-||6||
the hermits who never show themselves,
all say that they have found the Lord.
Of these, no one admits to any deficiency;
Abandoning all devices and contrivances,
Nanak has fallen at the Feet of the Guru. ||8||2||27||
But he alone is a devotee, whom the Lord has united with Himself. ||7||
I have sought His Sanctuary.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
among pleasure seekers, You are the Pleasure Seeker.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੁਰਗਿ ਮਛਿ ਪਇਆਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: teraa ant na paaeaa surag machh peaal jeeo |1|
lines.english: Your limits are not known to any of the beings in the heavens, in this world, or in the nether regions of the underworld. ||1||
Siree Raag, First Mehl, Third House:
Among Yogis, You are the Yogi;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਹਉ ਵਾਰਣੈ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਵ ਨੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree hau vaaranai kurabaan tere naav no |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am devoted, dedicated, a sacrifice to Your Name. ||1||Pause||
and assigned tasks to one and all.
You created the world,

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖਹਿ ਕੀਤਾ ਆਪਣਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਪਾਸਾ ਢਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vekheh keetaa aapanaa kar kudarat paasaa dtaal jeeo |2|
lines.english: You watch over Your Creation, and through Your All-powerful Creative Potency, You cast the dice. ||2||
You are manifest in the Expanse of Your Workshop.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਭ ਮੋਹੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਾਲਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur baajh na paaeo sabh mohee maaeaa jaal jeeo |3|
lines.english: but without the Guru, no one finds You. All are enticed and trapped by Maya. ||3||
Everyone longs for Your Name,
Meeting Him, the supreme status is obtained.
I am a sacrifice to the True Guru.
